overview: A complete, visually stunning real estate showcase website for Aggarwal Properties — a premium real estate agency in Delhi, India. Features luxury Navy & Gold branding, 5 fully designed pages, filterable property listings, enquiry forms, testimonials carousel, and WhatsApp integration. Built as a client-facing demo with hardcoded dummy data.
features: 5-page real estate website (Home, Properties, Property Detail, About, Contact)
Navy & Gold luxury branding with Playfair Display + DM Sans typography
Featured property listings with filter by Type, Category, BHK, and Location
Swiper.js testimonials carousel with autoplay and touch support
Enquiry forms with validation and success notifications on all key pages
Floating WhatsApp button with pulse animation on all pages
Fully responsive from 320px mobile to 1920px desktop
Smooth scroll animations and hover interactions throughout
Sticky navbar with scroll-triggered background transition
